title: Forest Focus
description: Immerse yourself in the gentle rustle of leaves and distant birdsong. Perfect for deep concentration.

title: Deep Calm
description: Find your center with steady, rhythmic pulses and warm harmonic layers.

title: Midnight Sleep
description: Gentle low-frequency waves designed to lull you into a restful state.

title: Quick Reset
description: A brief auditory palate cleanser to clear mental clutter.

title: Mountain Air
description: Crisp, airy soundscapes that provide a sense of space and clarity.

title: Ocean Breath
description: The rhythmic surge and retreat of the tide, grounding your awareness.
